title: Episode 21 Second Impact dialogues
wikitext:
[]: Episode 21 Second Impact dialogues             Quote Post by Mbryo » Sun Jan 17, 2016 1:17 am I've been reading through the wiki pages on how "CI doesn't reconcile with the show", and I'm curious, how many 'overlapped' dialogues are there in the opening of episode 21? There seems to be multiple dialogues going on during the fake documentary-style recording of Second Impact, but the subs I can find only seems to translate the most discernable dialogue. According to the wiki, there seems to be a dialogue mentioning "Adam's S2 Engine linking with an 'Explosive System'", but I can't find mention of such a dialogue anywhere else on the internet. Can somebody confirm if this was actually said?

[]: Re: Episode 21 Second Impact dialogues             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Jan 17, 2016 3:08 am Mbryo wrote: According to the wiki, there seems to be a dialogue mentioning "Adam's S2 Engine linking with an 'Explosive System'", but I can't find mention of such a dialogue anywhere else on the internet. Can somebody confirm if this was actually said?

[]: Re: Episode 21 Second Impact dialogues             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Jan 17, 2016 11:54 am Maybe the research team had outfitted Adam with a self-destruct or explosive bolts like the Evas have as a failsafe, and Adam integrated them somehow when it awakened?

[]: Re: Episode 21 Second Impact dialogues             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 17, 2016 3:43 pm Sachiel was able to intentionally self-destruct, and a few other Angels explode when their cores are destroyed. The term that the Katsuragi Team use may simply be referring to this intrinsic capacity. They make it sound like something mechanical, but the same holds for "S2 Engine" itself, which we know is completely organic. There used to be a full breakdown of the episode 21' dialogues on the evacommentary site, but I guess that's gone and only exists somewhere in my backups now?

[]: Re: Episode 21 Second Impact dialogues             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sun Jan 17, 2016 9:18 pm I could host it if you still have it.

[]: Re: Episode 21 Second Impact dialogues             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 18, 2016 12:14 am Found it. Sent Monk the files, but here's the dialogue any which way. You get to sort out the disparate conversations on your own, though. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Episode 21 Second Impact dialogues             Quote Post by cody727kirby » Thu Feb 25, 2016 2:41 pm Finished polishing up a Sources Page for an old YouTube video I did years ago, and in it, I attempted to piece together what exactly happened during Second Impact with all sources available, including Classified Information. Any feedback is welcome [14] "Adam, the First Angel — and the cause of Second Impact — was discovered by the Katsuragi Research Team at the South Pole. It was courtesy of Seele's funding that the Katsuragi Team discovered the White Moon, which contained Adam and the Spear of Longinus." (Classified Information, Hideaki Anno) "The contact experiment with the donor is scheduled for the 13th of next month. (Katsuragi Team member, Episode 21) "The DNA that dove into Adam is already physically fused!" (Katsuragi Team member, as Adam awakens and begins Second Impact, Episode 21) "The other Seed of Life, Adam, was awakened by mankind. The Katsuragi Investigation Team frantically attempted to reseal Adam using the Spear of Longinus, but failed. This is called the Second Impact." (Classified Information, Hideaki Anno) Crew Member: “The Lance! Pull the Lance back!” Crew Member: “It's no good! We can't maintain the magnetic field!” Crew Member: “It's sinking in!” [Adam begins to walk] Crew Member: “Get Adam itself to squeeze out the energy that can interfere with its Anti A.T. Field!” ( * ) Crew Member: "The conversion system has already been set!" Crew Member: “The S2 Engine and the detonator are being linked!” (Episode 21, After failing to reseal Adam with the Spear, and accidentally helping Adam to create its Anti A.T. Field when the Spear sinks in [see source 37b below], the team used their “conversion system” to overdrive Adam’s S2 engine’s power and interfere with its Anti A.T. Field, exploding Adam into an embryo. [Similar S2 overdrive explosions in the series: Various Angel self-destructions, and Unit 04’s destruction (installing S2 engine failed, Episode 17)] “Ultimately, through the phenomenon of the S2 engine apparently going into overdrive by artificial means... [Second Impact] blew Adam completely apart” (Classified Information, Hideaki Anno) [37b] NOTE : The Spear of Longinus can be a tool towards Instrumentality , rather than a security “locking” device, but only during an Impact (joining of Adam/Lilith). This happens in Third Impact with Shinji/Unit 01, but also in Second Impact with Adam (See Second Impact quotes below) “The Katsuragi Investigation Team frantically attempted to reseal Adam using the Spear of Longinus, but failed .” (Classified Information, Hideaki Anno) Crew Member: “The Lance! Pull the Lance back!” Crew Member: “It's no good! We can't maintain the magnetic field!” Crew Member: “It's sinking in !” [Adam begins to walk] Crew Member: “Get Adam itself to squeeze out the energy that can interfere with its Anti A.T. Field!” ( * ) (Episode 21, implying that they had tried to impale/subdue Adam with the Spear after it awakened with Lilith’s DNA, but the Spear instead sank into Adam, and became a tool to actually help Adam create its Anti A.T. Field, just like it did for Shinji/Unit 01 in End of Evangelion) https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B-kuHQ ... sp=sharing (End of Evangelion, The Spear becomes a tool towards Instrumentality for Shinji/Unit 01) (*) Fixed mistranslation in “Crew Member” quote, regarding the reason for Adam’s explosion during Second Impact: https://forum.evageeks.org/post/515450/ ... es/#515450

[]: Re: Episode 21 Second Impact dialogues             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Feb 25, 2016 3:20 pm Reichu wrote: Sachiel was able to intentionally self-destruct, and a few other Angels explode when their cores are destroyed. The term that the Katsuragi Team use may simply be referring to this intrinsic capacity. They make it sound like something mechanical, but the same holds for "S2 Engine" itself, which we know is completely organic.

[]: Re: Episode 21 Second Impact dialogues             Quote Post by Iuvenal » Thu Feb 25, 2016 4:48 pm SCENE: Two FAR are having drinks at a DIVE BAR. FAR BOB: So Jim, we're putting the finishing touches on these seed things before we goop our souls and shove 'em in there. Anything notable R&D has added before the big kool-aid party? FAR JIM: In fact we did, Bob. We added the ability for it to blow itself up. FAR BOB: Uh, Jim, I don't quite see the point of that. FAR JIM: Trust me Bob, it will come in handy if it runs into another seed and the two have to duke it out over control of the planet. FAR BOB: What?! Why would that happen? And in any case, wouldn't it be way better in the extremely unlikely event that two seeds run into each other for one to go to another planet rather than kill off one seventh of our species in a brawl? What else haven't you told me? FAR JIM: The explosion is shaped like a giant cross. FAR BOB: Why? FAR JIM: Because shut up, that's why! Exeunt FAR.

[]: Re: Episode 21 Second Impact dialogues             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Thu Feb 25, 2016 8:35 pm cody727kirby wrote: Crew Member: “Get Adam itself to squeeze out the energy that can interfere with its Anti A.T. Field!” ( * )

There seems to be multiple dialogues going on during the fake documentary-style recording of Second Impact, but the subs I can find only seems to translate the m
